title: claytonia paniculata
intro: Claytonia paniculata, also known as American miner's lettuce or winter purslane, is a species of flowering plant in the purslane family, Portulacaceae. It is a succulent perennial that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have benefits for the cardiovascular system and immune system. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Claytonia paniculata can be prepared for herbal use in various ways, including as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal supplements and remedies.
